name: Default Light
creator: MasselGUARD
description: Clean professional light theme. GitHub-inspired palette.

_hints.name: Display name shown in the theme picker.
_hints.type: 'dark' or 'light' — used for auto system-theme switching.
_hints.creator: Your name or handle, shown in the info panel.
_hints.description: Short description shown below the picker. Max 3 lines / 150 chars.
_hints.appName: Text shown in the title bar and tray tooltip. Lets you white-label the app.
_hints.fontFamily: Any font installed on the system. E.g. 'Consolas', 'Inter', 'Segoe UI'.
_hints.fontSize: Base font size in points for body text. Recommended 11–14.
_hints.cornerRadius: Radius for window and card corners in pixels. 0 = sharp, 6 = rounded.
_hints.colorWindowBg: Main window and dialog background. Lightest layer.
_hints.colorSurface: Title bar, footer, sidebar, button bars — pure white on light themes.
_hints.colorCard: Content cards, list backgrounds, input fields — slightly darker than surface.
_hints.colorBorder: All borders and dividers. Keep subtle.
_hints.colorAccent: Links, headings, active/selected highlights. Your brand colour goes here.
_hints.colorDanger: Destructive action buttons, unavailable tunnel text, close button.
_hints.colorTextPrimary: Primary readable text — very dark for high contrast on light background.
_hints.colorTextMuted: Labels, hints, section headers, secondary info — medium grey.
_hints.colorHighlight: Button hover background and selected list row fill — use a very light tint of accent.
_hints.colorError: Error banner text and border colour.
_hints.colorErrorBg: Error banner background — use a very light tint of colorError.
_hints.colorWarning: Warning panel text and border (orphaned service warnings).
_hints.colorWarningBg: Warning panel background — use a very light tint of colorWarning.
_hints.colorListHover: List row background when the mouse hovers over it — subtle grey.
_hints.colorListSelected: List row background when selected — light tint of accent.
_hints.backgroundImage: Filename of an image in this theme folder. E.g. 'bg.png'. Leave empty for none.
_hints.appIcon: Custom tray and title-bar icon. Supports .ico .png .bmp .jpg. Leave empty to use built-in.
_hints.logo: Custom logo image shown in the title bar. Leave empty for default built-in shield.
_hints.variables: Free-form key/value pairs surfaced as 'Var.<key>' dynamic resources for advanced themes.
_hints._colourFormat: All colour values accept: #RRGGBB (fully opaque), #AARRGGBB (with transparency), or named colours like 'Transparent'.
_hints.titleBarHeight: Height of the title bar in pixels. Default 48. Minimum 32.
_hints.showTitleBarIcon: Show the logo/shield icon in the title bar. true/false.
_hints.showTitleBarAppName: Show the application name text in the title bar. true/false.
_hints.showResizeGrip: Show the resize grip in the bottom-right corner. true/false.
_hints.windowOpacity: Overall window opacity. 1.0 = fully opaque, 0.1 = nearly transparent.
_hints.showStatusBar: Show the status bar below the title bar. true/false.
_hints.statusBarHeight: Height of the status bar in pixels. Default 38. Minimum 24.
_hints.showStatusWifi: Show the WiFi network name in the status bar. true/false.
_hints.showStatusTunnel: Show the active tunnel name in the status bar. true/false.
_hints.colorTrayBg: Tray context menu background. Leave empty to inherit colorSurface.
_hints.colorTrayHover: Tray menu item hover background. Leave empty to inherit colorBorder.
_hints.colorTrayText: Tray menu item text colour. Leave empty to inherit colorTextPrimary.
_hints.colorTrayBorder: Tray menu border and separator. Leave empty to inherit colorBorder.
_hints.colorTrayImageMargin: Tray menu left image-margin column. Leave empty to inherit colorWindowBg.
